column6:
Verify that 
1) "Pathway" card should be displayed inside "My Assignments" section. Each card should have details as :

a) Pathway image on the top in 2:1 ratio with the number of smartcards iniside pathway on the bottom right side of image.
b) Below that "pathway" label in the form of chip to describe the type of content
c) Duration like 5h , 2h 15 or 1000+h, Next to the pathway chip, if duration is longer than the UI space should be truncated.(It is should be same as received from api)
d) Name of the card in bold letters in 2 lines max. Truncate after that.
e) Below that provider's name and image or Author's name, image should be displayed based on config.

2) Below that Pathway image in 2:1 ratio.
3) Below that "pathway" label in chip to describe the type of content and duration seperated by vertical line.
4) Below that title of the card in bold letters. Here full title should be shown. 
5) Below that description of the card should be displayed in maximum of 3 lines and the rest should be truncated with a "Read More" button.
6) Below that 'Private' label along with info icon should be displayed if pathway is private otherwise no label should be displayed.
7) Next to above detail, number of views of the card separated by vertical line.
8) Below that like and comments icon along with bookmark icon should be displayed.
9) Below that a horizontal seperator line.
10) Below that widget to rate pathway and the total ratings of path should be displayed seperated by vertical line.
11) Below that the provider's name and image and provider designation or Author's name, image and author designation with with state should be displayed inside light grey rectangle box based on config.
12) Inside above grey rectangle box , 'Due Date' and 'Status' labels, along with their respective values separated by a vertical line, should be displayed below provide/author name. N/A should be displayed if any of value is not able , these details should be hide if both the details are not bale.
12) Below that two tabs "Smartcards" and "Details" should be displayed.
14) "Smartcards" tab title should have the total number of smartcards in the pathway.
15) "Details" tab should have details related to pathway.
